turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Oh, okay, um, that's fine with me. Thanks for letting me know. I'm calling to see if I can schedule my annual physical exam sometime next week if you have any openings?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Oh, right, thank you. Yes, I'm calling Pivot to schedule my physical. Is this the right number?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Can you please provide your date of birth?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Sure, um, my date of birth is March 15th, 1978. Does that help?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes. You've reached Pivot Point Orthopedics. To help

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Oh, wait — orthopedics? Um, I think I may have called the wrong number. I'm looking to schedule a routine physical exam, not an orthopedics appointment. Is this not a general medical office?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Oh okay, so this is a general medical office then? Great! So, um, can we go ahead and schedule that annual physical for me sometime next week?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Oh, I see — so this is orthopedics, not a general practice. I think I called the wrong place. Do you happen to have the number for a general medical office, or should I just hang up and look for the right one?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Yeah, sorry, go ahead — I'm listening.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: No worries at all. If you need anything related to orthopedics,

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text:
Right, but I don't need orthopedics — I just need a regular physical exam. So I think I've got the wrong number. Thanks anyway, and sorry for the confusion!

 Thank you, bye.
